name: Breakfast Tortillas
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the potatoes in a dry nonstick skillet, stirring frequently, until lightly browned, about 15 minutes.
2. Add the remaining ingredients to the skillet and cook another 5 minutes, stirring occasionally, until heated through.
3. Spoon a line of the mixture down the center of each tortilla.
4. Roll up each tortilla and enjoy.
